Meaning.Vi: nhà; nơi chốn quen thuộc; quê hương
Meaning.En: The place where one lives permanently, especially as a member of a family or household; a familiar or comforting place or situation.
Meaning.Example: She finally returned home after a long trip abroad.

Situation.Vi: Một ngôi nhà mà một người sống cùng gia đình.
Situation.En: A building where a person lives with their family.

Situation.Vi: Cảm giác an toàn, thân thuộc trong một môi trường quen thuộc.
Situation.En: A feeling of safety and familiarity in a familiar environment.

Meaning.En: Relating to or located at one’s home; not away or traveling.
Meaning.Example: My brother is at home studying for his exams.

Situation.Vi: Khi ai đó không ở nơi làm việc hoặc không đi du lịch.
Situation.En: When someone is not at work or traveling.

Meaning.En: To or at one’s home; back to the place where one lives.
Meaning.Example: Let’s go home early today—it’s been a long day.

Situation.Vi: Hành động trở về nơi mình sinh sống.
Situation.En: The action of returning to one’s residence.
